title: anettea gardneri
intro: Anettea gardneri, also known as Aerva lanata, is a plant species that belongs to the family Amaranthaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aerva lanata include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant. Aerva lanata can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are often prepared by steeping the leaves or roots in hot water.
